textByHash.b92595c1337b91171b5ca26c450e59964d8b3dd4: Ah, this be the Tower of Life! Beautiful, isn't it?
textByHash.11a5e03379e86e079425d7874f2d865cc034e698: I question why you are so pleased about this.
textByHash.67fb049f94872f30c8a1ff7a539a51cc11c1c6f0: Why, thanks. You'll find various pieces of machinery to fix in there. You can no doubt find the materials in there, too.
textByHash.f6b7ee491638b4a1e0e8daf53f3610f43bc3994b: At last! Our work is complete!
textByHash.b2c06af8f041f53ee10b5e75da71b54e3f4e9fbd: It can talk! A real success.
textByHash.2bdf1c00dbdd236111609dd66f0793b12b191943: Yes, it's just an experiment in alchemy.
textByHash.28a187d50908a6bd6fd3051093df96256e50dd23: Get out of the tower before it's too late!
textByHash.d354f750f430a5a6d1358745f5258cf8e2b0cbf1: Rather you than me. Can't say you look like you'll make it out alive.
textByHash.60faed6077959a0a61a3b22f18ad3e7650e99bc1: So, you want me to lie?
